node.text: Nate recently taught vegan ice cream recipes on his cooking show and learned some new recipes.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "cooking show event") on Session 21 (Score: 0.95)
Matched atom(content =~ "attend cooking show") on Observation 1 (Score: 0.99)

node.text: Nate's favorite dish from his cooking show is coconut milk ice cream for its smooth, creamy, and dairy-free qualities.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "cooking show event") on Session 21 (Score: 0.95)
Matched atom(content =~ "attend cooking show") on Observation 2 (Score: 0.98)

node.text: Nate is interested in trying Joanna's dairy-free chocolate cake with raspberries and other recipes she likes making.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "cooking show event") on Session 21 (Score: 0.95)
Matched atom(content =~ "attend cooking show") on Observation 4 (Score: 0.97)

node.text: Nate expresses interest in Joanna's dairy-free dessert with blueberries, coconut milk, and a gluten-free crust mentioning it looks amazing.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "cooking show event") on Session 21 (Score: 0.95)
Matched atom(content =~ "attend cooking show") on Observation 5 (Score: 0.91)

node.text: Nate offers tips for dairy-free baking, such as using dairy-free margarine or coconut oil instead of butter.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "attend cooking show") on Observation 5 (Score: 0.89)

node.text: Nate also loves dairy-free chocolate mousse as it is super creamy and tastes like the real thing.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "cooking show event") on Session 21 (Score: 0.95)

node.text: Nate is willing to help anytime Joanna needs baking tips.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "attend cooking show") on Observation 6 (Score: 0.53)

node.text: Nate enjoys helping with making desserts that suit everyone's diets.
